hero.tagline: Where the city meets the night
hero.title: Nouakchott Night
hero.subtitle: A grand restaurant for guests and families — fine dining, warm hospitality, and evenings to remember.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: A destination for every generation
about.p1: Nouakchott Night welcomes travelers, locals, and families under one roof. Our spacious dining rooms, private corners, and lively terrace create the perfect setting for celebrations and quiet dinners alike.
about.p2: From traditional Mauritanian flavors to international cuisine, every plate is prepared with care. Our team treats every guest like family.

gallery.label: Gallery
gallery.title: Moments at Nouakchott Night
gallery.subtitle: Three glimpses into our atmosphere — dining, celebration, and the magic of the night.

experience.label: The Experience
experience.title: Crafted for guests & families
experience.paused: Paused — take your time to read

dining.title: Fine Dining
dining.desc: Seasonal menus, fresh ingredients, and chefs who honor tradition while embracing creativity.

family.title: Family Spaces
family.desc: Comfortable seating, kids-friendly options, and rooms designed so everyone feels at home.

events.title: Celebrations
events.desc: Weddings, birthdays, and corporate gatherings — we host your most important nights.

ambiance.title: Night Ambiance
ambiance.desc: Soft lighting, live music on weekends, and views that capture the spirit of Nouakchott.

contact.label: Visit Us
contact.title: Reserve your table
contact.subtitle: We look forward to welcoming you and your loved ones.

footer.tagline: Nouakchott Night — Hospitality under the stars.
